Tobrin's Mystical Eyepatch  
 


Slot: FACE
WIS: +15 INT: +15
Effect: See Invisible (Worn, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Tobrin's Mystical Eyepatch

Slot: FACE
WIS: +15 INT: +15
Effect: See Invisible (Worn, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:250 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:1060
Submitted By:Lothax

Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-16 05:16:50
Page Updated:Wed May 29th, 2024

Expansion: Original
Average Price: 30,000pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 45

# Jul 23 2020 at 10:07 PM Rating: Decent

11 posts

▲ Page top
No HP
QuoteReply
# Apr 14 2004 at 2:18 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592262919084
22 posts
the 15 WIS is crazyand the see invis is a ok bonus but do people really require it. the main people who will buy this will be priests and casters which get see invis anyway. so why not save that 15k and get something which has around 10 WIS and has some HP

QuoteReply
# Jun 19 2004 at 2:39 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591770676582
23 posts
Cleric's don't naturally get see invis so this is a pretty nice mask if you prefer oldschool items.

Sale Price
QuoteReply
# Aug 31 2003 at 8:38 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592760957248
16 posts
I acquired one of these the other day, and I have to say it is quite the decision whether or not I want to equip it or sell it. I would have to say that 17k is a little ridiculous but on my server I wouldn't be surprised.

If anyone on Kane Bayle would like to buy this please send me a tell, a price agreement can me made.

Aeginos Shroomspore
52nd Druid of Tunare
▲ Page top
RE: Sale Price
QuoteReply
# Sep 14 2003 at 10:31 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591784627170
Scholar
509 posts
It's worth 15k for sure this is the highest wiz item a druid can get that's not no drop for the face slot. I picked mine up for 5500 and was damn glad to have it. Plus the see invis is sweet too. Helps me find lost group members who have been camoed when we are running through a zone.
▲ Page top
Fabulous for Magicians
QuoteReply
# Apr 02 2003 at 2:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1704672973637
Guru
5,311 posts
I can't imagine there are many +15 int face items a magician can wear. Now add "see invisible" to that? At higher levels I'm finding that I use my air pet almost exclusively. The only drawback is having to repeatedly cast see invisible on myself. This would be the perfect solution.

To those of you who are offended by Malaclypse's claim that he outtanks warriors; reread the last line of his brag; "LOADING, PLEASE WAIT". See? It's a joke!
▲ Page top
RE: Fabulous for Magicians
QuoteReply
# Apr 15 2003 at 11:05 AM Rating: Decent
Cilrail
Scholar
318 posts
I picked this up with my lvl 5 bard last night in the Fennin Ro bazzar for 1 (ONE) plat off a trader. I had no use for the int/wis bonus, but figured the see invis might come in handy. Had no idea it was worth this much...now the hard part is to decide to sell it for a HUGE profit, or give it to one of my other characters...decisions, decisions

ans as for duelling without spells ur obviously either lying or dueling warriors who have less than quarter of ur lvls!

silly mage!
QuoteReply
# Mar 31 2003 at 8:43 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759397742
View User Forum
501 posts
regarding the post malaclypse posted
quote:

Yeah I know what you mean. I really need more haste items. I can out tank any warrior any day! I beat em every time in duels, without spells! Just get em on over here and I'll shove my staff of writhing straight up their... LOADING PLEASE WAIT...

do you actaully know what tanking involves u silly mage?
it involves taking hits which u obvously cant do as well as a warrior. sure u may be able to deal lots of dmg but thats not tanking is it? also id be willling to bet you havent dueled a mellee who has real good resists cause then you would likely get a shock when ur snare resists and ur root doesnt land and ur nukes suck while the mellee gets up close and pounds ur robed ***!

# Feb 13 2003 at 10:35 AM Rating: Decent

I got an eyepatch last night on a Talendor raid! We dropped him with 2 groups but, I would say possible with one group 58+. I could be wrong? Watch out for the AoE DD and DoT.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Feb 23 2003 at 9:14 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) just watched a war and cleric partner this guy i cried and went to bed
#REDACTED, Posted: Dec 17 2002 at 10:24 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I won this and traded to a chanter cause he won RBB and me as warrior won Eyepatch. Trade seemed fair.
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 11 2002 at 10:05 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) If this ever dropped I could see the competition being fierce among casters rolling for it hehe...be nice out there!
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 11 2002 at 6:23 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) On PvP this would be nice.... and what caster would not like 15 to their wis/int stat? i know i wouldnt mind
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 27 2002 at 7:55 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) effect on this is great? when did see invis become an uber stat? flowing thought 7.. that is a great stat. speaking of ft7, a warrior would get as much use out of this item as he would one with ft7, and should be flogged publicly for even attempting to roll for it.
#REDACTED, Posted: Dec 25 2002 at 2:25 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Hail, Getting shafted on the 8th Coldain ring quest turn-in. Hello there Sweendog, would you like to go kill a few dozen more giants and rare spawns all over Velious for a [sweet ring]?
RE: great effect?
QuoteReply
# Aug 29 2002 at 2:51 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591776013048
View User Forum
263 posts
haven't quite figured out how to use the "Reply to" method of posting, have you?


See Invis is useful on PVP servers, no? and frankly, i wouldn't mind having that effect without the need to memmorize and cast the spell. i'd wager that it's the +15 wis and int makes this desirable. the effect is more or less a bonus.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 05 2002 at 4:55 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I couldn't agree with you more Tolk.
RE: great effect?
QuoteReply
# Dec 06 2002 at 11:01 AM Rating: Default
Tassoth
574 posts
this is something i cant fully appreciate as a 41bst i get see invis but also have bracer of the hidden with right click see invis, something i found while going through lake of el gimpo, but they currently sell for over 2.5k on veeshan.

i understand the practical use on PvP servers but im not in many zones with invis mobs. could someone please enlighten me on the other practicalities of the effect?

but other than that the wis alone make me like the piece even more
____________________________
The Real Iksar

Madho
Novocane
Poldarn
▲ Page top
RE: great effect?
QuoteReply
# Jan 08 2003 at 4:45 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591778323867
View User Forum
24 posts
I think what the original poster intended to mean was that on a PvP server, you would have a slight edge over someone without it in that you could see if another player killer was laying in wait with invis on for someone to step into his trap.

I openly admit to never playing on a PvP server. That being said, while I see the value of being able to see a sneak attack before it happens, I would be majorly upset to find an item of this caliber looted from my corpse if I lost the round, being that it ISN'T no drop.

Just my thoughts.
▲ Page top
A bit overvalued
QuoteReply
# Aug 16 2002 at 8:57 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591769954452
5 posts
Just in response to the average price listed for this item, I think it is a bit overvalued. Two merchants in the Bazaar on Xegony (obviously competing against each other) sold theirs for 13kpp each. Unless one is on a server with a totally different economy, anyone paying over 15k (17k TOPS) for this item has more plat then sense.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 27 2002 at 10:38 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) First vox raid I had been on. This thing dropped I won it with a 963 out of 1000. #REDACTED, Posted: Nov 21 2001 at 6:42 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Couold someone tell me, am I drooling everywhere? Haveing this would make my "WBD" standing even better!
